title: ruscus × murtae
intro: Ruscus × murtae, also known as the Butcher's Broom, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Ruscus genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation. The Butcher's Broom is rich in ruscogenin, a compound that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, providing several health benefits such as relieving varicose veins and improving digestion. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or dried extract, and it is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs for its synergistic effects.
